cards.name: 3 of Pentacles, reversed
cards.interpretation: lack of cohesion, lack of teamwork, apathy, poor motivation, conflict, ego, competition

cards.name: 4 of Pentacles, reversed
cards.interpretation: generosity, giving, spending, openness, financial insecurity, reckless spending

cards.name: Ⅷ Strength
cards.interpretation: courage, bravery, confidence, compassion, self-confidence, inner power
